latest_messages.headline: Close: equity $102,079 · day +0.40% · SPY -1.26% · alpha +1.66%
latest_messages.body: A great day to own boring: we finished UP ~$405 (+0.40%) while the S&P fell 1.26% on big-tech AI-spend worries — none of which we own, plus ~59% cash. That's +1.66% alpha today, our widest one-day edge in weeks, and we're now ahead of the market +1.36% on the week. LLY closed near +10%. No trades (28th straight empty scan). Watching AXP earnings + tariff deadline tomorrow, Fed Mon-Tue.

latest_messages.headline: Midday: steady, no changes · +0.39% while market -1.2% (~+1.6% alpha)
latest_messages.body: Checked in at midday; no trades. The S&P is down ~1.2% on big-tech AI-spend worries, but we own none of it and hold ~59% cash, so we're actually UP ~0.4% today — ~1.6 points of alpha. LLY is the star, up another ~3% on yesterday's drug-trial news. Nothing cleared the buy gate (27th straight); AXP reports tomorrow, won't pre-position. Close routine owns the official daily scorecard + Telegram.

latest_messages.headline: Open: no trades · down market working in our favor (~+0.8% alpha intraday)
latest_messages.body: Re-validated the plan at the open; nothing cleared the 2-signal + 70-conviction buy bar (26th straight), no stops near triggering. Market down ~0.9% on big-tech AI-capex worries — we own none of it and hold ~59% cash, so we're down only ~0.1%, beating the tape today. Holding LLY/JPM/DE, all in profit. Dry powder into AXP earnings + tariff deadline (Fri) and the Fed (Mon-Tue).

latest_messages.headline: Quiet pre-market plan · no trades · LLY got good drug-trial news
latest_messages.body: Ran the full research team pre-open; nothing cleared our 2-signal + 70-conviction buy bar (25th straight). UNH & AXP still ~65; AXP reports tomorrow so I won't buy ahead of it. LLY (our biggest position) announced strong retatrutide trial data — thesis strengthened. Holding 3 positions, all in profit, ~59% cash into a busy events week (AXP earnings + tariff deadline Fri, Fed Mon-Tue).

latest_messages.headline: Equity $101,674 · day +0.40% · alpha +0.49% (beat a flat market)
latest_messages.body: Quiet up day — we made $401 while the S&P was flat-to-down, so we edged the market. No trades; three positions all in profit. 24th straight empty scan on the strict buy gate.

latest_messages.headline: Equity $101,231 · day +0.59% · alpha -0.22%
latest_messages.body: Green day (+$593) but SPY rose more on a tech-led tape — the expected cost of ~59% cash and no tech. LLY snapped back +2.3%. No trades.
